summary: Completed E2E testing of Phase C - Viral & Upgrade Features. All features verified working: (1) Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns 5 curated products, GET /api/user/daily-usage returns usage limits/counts, POST /api/user/track-insight increments counter, GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns max_analyses_daily and insights_used_today. (2) Frontend: Features/Pricing nav links scroll to correct sections (#features, #pricing), Daily Picks section renders on /trending-products with star icon, date, 5 cards, Product detail page shows locked Supplier and Ad sections for free users, Upgrade modal triggers on click, Daily usage banner shows on dashboard.

issues: Many product images show green placeholder instead of actual product photos - data enrichment may be needed

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns picks array with date field
Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks products have required fields (id, slug, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent)
Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns max 5 products
Backend: GET /api/user/daily-usage requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/user/daily-usage returns daily_limit, insights_used, remaining for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/user/daily-usage includes user plan field
Backend: POST /api/user/track-insight requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/user/track-insight increments insights_used counter
Backend: POST /api/user/track-insight returns limit_reached field
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns max_analyses_daily in features
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns insights_used_today in features
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns user plan
Backend: Admin user has elite plan with high/unlimited daily limit
Frontend: Landing page Features nav link scrolls to #features section
Frontend: Landing page Pricing nav link scrolls to #pricing section
Frontend: /trending-products shows Daily Picks section with data-testid='daily-picks-section'
Frontend: Daily Picks has star icon (amber color)
Frontend: Daily Picks shows formatted date (Friday 13 March)
Frontend: Daily Picks displays 5 product cards
Frontend: Product detail page shows locked supplier section for free user
Frontend: Product detail page shows locked ad creative section for free user
Frontend: Clicking locked supplier section triggers upgrade modal
Frontend: Clicking locked ad section triggers upgrade modal
Frontend: Upgrade modal shows correct plan details (£19/month Starter)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Daily Usage Banner for free user
Frontend: Usage banner shows 'Daily insight limit reached' text
Frontend: Usage banner shows Upgrade button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user testuser_phase_c@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Viral & Upgrade features fully tested: (1) Daily picks endpoint returns 5 curated products with deterministic daily selection based on date seed. (2) Daily usage tracking via /api/user/daily-usage and /api/user/track-insight endpoints working. (3) Feature access endpoint includes max_analyses_daily and insights_used_today. (4) Free users have 2 daily insight limit (shown as 3/2 in UI meaning exceeded). (5) Locked sections (Supplier Intelligence, Ad Creative, Score Breakdown) render for free users with blur overlay. (6) UpgradeModal component triggers correctly with appropriate plan details. (7) DailyUsageBanner renders on dashboard showing usage stats. (8) Nav links on landing page use scrollIntoView with smooth behavior for hash navigation.

Landing Page Nav.details: Features link scrolls to #features, Pricing link scrolls to #pricing section

Daily Picks API.details: Returns 5 curated products with id, slug, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent

Daily Usage API.details: Returns plan, daily_limit, insights_used, remaining, is_unlimited

Track Insight API.details: Increments insights_used, returns updated usage with limit_reached flag

Daily Picks Section UI.details: Star icon, date, 5 product cards with score and margin

Locked Supplier Section.details: Free users see blurred content with 'Unlock Supplier Intelligence' prompt

Locked Ad Section.details: Free users see blurred content with upgrade prompt

Upgrade Modal.details: Shows plan details, features list, pricing, CTA button

Daily Usage Banner.details: Shows usage stats, progress bar, Upgrade button when limit reached

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints return real data from MongoDB
